jsonLd.title: Lenskart is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Lenskart family as a E-commerce Executive in Hyderabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Lenskart:
Lenskart is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lenskart!
